title: Ghorad (Great Indian Bustard)
description: Source: News on Air Subject: Species in News Context: After a decade-long hiatus, a Great Indian Bustard (Ghorad) chick has been born in Gujarat’s Kutch district through a pioneering inter-state conservation effort.
